3079750.name: Zero Agency
3079750.description:
Zero Agency is a squad based indie RTS game with tactical elements where you lead 4 cybernetic agents through a series of contracts, earning credits along the way, unlocking more deadly technologies and ultimately deciding the fate of a cyber dystopic world.

Zero agency features fully destructable buildings and structures in both cityscapes and desolate wastelands, unravel the dark history of the world and embark on a mission to either reinforce the control systems that define it, or to break them.

Enable your agents to hack tech, blow apart buildings or turn momentarily invisible through a series of itemisation and augmentation choices.
3079750.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
